detaileddescription.para: Type of platform that we are querying these users from. Will be set to ACCELBYTE if these are all AccelByte IDs, or the specific platform name otherwise.
Array of IDs that we will query
Whether all of these users that we are querying will be marked as important.
Delegate that will be fired once the queries complete
Actual array of user IDs that will be queried on the backend
Array of users that we were able to query from the backend
Array of users that we already had cached in our user store
Flag representing whether we have finished querying basic user info
Flag representing whether we have finished querying platform user information

memberdef.argsstring: (FOnlineSubsystemAccelByte *const InABSubsystem, int32 InLocalUserNum, const TArray< FString > &AccelByteIds, bool InBIsImportant, const FOnQueryUsersComplete &InDelegate)
memberdef.name: FOnlineAsyncTaskAccelByteQueryUsersByIds

detaileddescription.para: Queries a bulk of AccelByte IDs using a local user index

memberdef.argsstring: (FOnlineSubsystemAccelByte *const InABSubsystem, int32 InLocalUserNum, const FString InPlatformType, const TArray< FString > &PlatformIds, bool InBIsImportant, const FOnQueryUsersComplete &InDelegate)
memberdef.name: FOnlineAsyncTaskAccelByteQueryUsersByIds

detaileddescription.para: Queries a bulk of platform IDs to attempt to get AccelByte accounts using a local user index

memberdef.argsstring: (FOnlineSubsystemAccelByte *const InABSubsystem, const FUniqueNetId &InUserId, const TArray< FString > &AccelByteIds, bool InBIsImportant, const FOnQueryUsersComplete &InDelegate)
memberdef.name: FOnlineAsyncTaskAccelByteQueryUsersByIds

detaileddescription.para: Queries a bulk of AccelByte IDs using a user ID

memberdef.argsstring: (FOnlineSubsystemAccelByte *const InABSubsystem, const FUniqueNetId &InUserId, const FString InPlatformType, const TArray< FString > &PlatformIds, bool InBIsImportant, const FOnQueryUsersComplete &InDelegate)
memberdef.name: FOnlineAsyncTaskAccelByteQueryUsersByIds

detaileddescription.para: Queries a bulk of platform IDs to attempt to get AccelByte accounts using a user ID
Basic initialize override to check if we are using timeouts, and if so update the last task update time to the current time.
Simple tick override to check if we are using timeouts, and if so check the task timeout and complete the task unsuccessfully if it's over its timeout
Basic method to get the current name of the task, used for ToString on tasks as well as trace logs.
Should be overridden by any async task that extends from this base class.
Delegate handler for when querying platform ID mappings in bulk succeeds
Delegate handler for when querying platform ID mappings in bulk fails
Calls method to get basic user information by an array of AccelByte IDs
Delegate handler for when querying basic user information by AccelByte IDs succeeds
Delegate handler for when querying basic user information by platform IDs fails
Make a call to query the user manually on the platform that corresponds to the one we are currently on
Method to attempt to extract platform type and ID that matches current platform OSS from basic info structure into a composite ID structure that we are creating.
Task to query a bulk of users by AccelByte or platform IDs, will add these users to the user cache.
